name: tdmcp
description: AI-native visual creation for TouchDesigner — build real node networks from plain language.

TDMCP_TD_HOST.title: TouchDesigner host
TDMCP_TD_HOST.description: Hostname/IP of the TouchDesigner Web Server DAT bridge. Use 127.0.0.1 when TouchDesigner runs on this machine.

TDMCP_TD_PORT.title: TouchDesigner port
TDMCP_TD_PORT.description: Port of the TouchDesigner Web Server DAT bridge (must match the bridge's port).

TDMCP_BRIDGE_TOKEN.title: TouchDesigner bridge token
TDMCP_BRIDGE_TOKEN.description: Optional bearer token shared with the TouchDesigner bridge. Leave blank only on trusted local networks.

TDMCP_RAW_PYTHON.title: Raw Python tools
TDMCP_RAW_PYTHON.description: Set to off to hide the two client-authored raw-Python escape-hatch tools.

TDMCP_TOOL_PROFILE.title: Tool profile
TDMCP_TOOL_PROFILE.description: Use full for all tools or safe to hide destructive/raw-code tools for autonomous sessions.
